question: A shopkeeper has 240 apples. He sells 3/4 of them and then receives a new shipment of 80 apples. How many apples does he have now?
A train travels at 60 km/h. How far does it travel in 2 hours and 30 minutes?
A rectangle has a length of 12 cm and a width of 7 cm. What is its perimeter?
Solve for x: 3x + 7 = 22
A bag contains 4 red balls and 6 blue balls. What is the probability of picking a red ball? Express as a decimal.
A store is having a 30% off sale. After the discount, a jacket costs $84. What was the original price of the jacket?
Two pipes can fill a tank. Pipe A fills it in 6 hours, Pipe B fills it in 4 hours. How many hours will it take to fill the tank if both pipes are open simultaneously?
Solve for x: 2x² - 8 = 0. Give the positive value of x.
If f(x) = 3x² - 2x + 1, what is f(4)?
A system of equations: 2x + 3y = 12 and x - y = 1. What is the value of x?
A fair six-sided die is rolled twice. What is the probability of getting a sum of 9? Express as a fraction in decimal form.
In a class of 30 students, 18 play cricket and 15 play football. 10 play both. How many students play neither sport?
A car depreciates in value by 15% each year. If it is currently worth $20,000, what will it be worth after 2 years? Round to the nearest dollar.
The sum of three consecutive even integers is 78. What is the largest of the three integers?
How many ways can a committee of 3 be chosen from a group of 8 people?
The roots of the equation x² - 5x + k = 0 are in the ratio 2:3. Find the value of k.
A boat travels 36 km upstream and 48 km downstream in the same amount of time. If the river current is 3 km/h, what is the speed of the boat in still water in km/h?
A box has 5 red, 4 blue, and 3 green balls. Three balls are drawn at random without replacement. What is the probability that all three are different colors? Round to 4 decimal places.
In how many ways can the letters of the word MISSISSIPPI be arranged?
If log(x) + log(x-3) = 1 (base 10), find the positive value of x.
